Est. 2019 · Accra, Ghana
5+Years of Impact

Who We Are

A Force for Sustainable Change in Africa & Beyond

The world faces mounting challenges — poverty, inequality, climate change, and conflict — that are especially acute across Africa, where many communities lack access to clean water, food, healthcare, and education.


GIIRD was founded to address these challenges through community empowerment, environmental conservation, health outreach, and economic development — partnering with communities, governments, and global organisations to deliver lasting change.

Community-Led

We work alongside communities — not above them — to create change that lasts.

Environmentally Conscious

Every programme integrates sustainability as a core principle.

Globally Connected

We build partnerships that amplify local impact on an international stage.

Our Foundation

Mission & Vision

“

Our Mission

To empower communities to achieve sustainable development through access to basic needs, entrepreneurship, skills development, and environmental conservation — in partnership with local communities, governments, and organisations worldwide.

“

Our Vision

A world where all communities have access to basic needs, are empowered to achieve their full potential, and live in harmony with the environment — regardless of geography, gender, or background.

What We Stand For

Our Aims & Goals

Six pillars guide everything we do — from the communities we serve to the planet we protect.

01
Empowerment

Community Empowerment

Promote sustainable development in Africa and globally through active community-level engagement and capacity building.

02
Welfare

Access to Basic Needs

Provide clean water, education, healthcare, and food security to underserved communities through targeted programmes.

03
Equality

Gender Equality & Justice

Champion gender equality and social justice by empowering women and marginalised groups across all our programmes.

04
Economy

Economic Development

Foster entrepreneurship, skills development, and economic growth to build long-term community self-sufficiency.

05
Environment

Environmental Sustainability

Drive conservation and sustainable practices to protect ecosystems for present and future generations.

06
Partnerships

Strategic Partnerships

Build lasting partnerships with governments, NGOs, and international bodies to amplify reach and impact across Africa.

Our Work on the Ground

Active Programs & Initiatives

From health outreach to capacity building — GIIRD's programmes are hands-on and community-led.

Health

Community Health Outreach

Free health screenings, medical support, and hygiene education delivered directly to rural and underserved communities.

Youth & Education

Youth Empowerment

Skills training, STEM education, mentorship, and leadership programmes for young Africans building futures.

Capacity Building

Team & Capacity Building

Professional development workshops equipping community leaders and partners with tools for sustainable impact.

Get Involved

Volunteer With Us

GIIRD welcomes passionate individuals ready to contribute. Whether on the ground or remotely, your skills can drive real change across Africa.

Available Roles

  • Environmental Conservation Drive Volunteer
  • Community Outreach & Education Coordinator
  • Health Programme Support Officer
  • Youth Mentorship Facilitator
  • Communications & Social Media Volunteer
  • Research & Documentation Assistant

Requirements

  • Passion for humanitarian and environmental causes
  • Commitment to GIIRD's mission and values
  • Strong communication and teamwork skills
  • No formal qualifications required — training provided

Sign Up to Volunteer

Join the GIIRD family. Your information is sent securely to our team.
